_notes: Templates obs-operator reads to render the FoH announcement UI buttons. Slot fields are filled by FoH at press time. Shape matches 02-architecture.md section 7.

templates.label: Auditorium opens in N minutes
templates.body: The auditorium will open in {minutes} minutes.
templates.open_body: The auditorium is now open. Please take your seats.

templates.label: Auditorium is now open
templates.body: The auditorium is now open. Please take your seats.

templates.label: Curtain in N minutes
templates.body: The performance will begin in {minutes} minutes. Please take your seats.
templates.countdown_body: Curtain in {minutes} minute{plural}. Please take your seats.
templates.open_body: The performance is beginning. Please take your seats.

templates.label: Interval (N min)
templates.body: Interval. The bar is open. Act II begins in approximately {minutes} minutes.
templates.countdown_body: Interval — the bar is open. Act II begins in {minutes} minute{plural}.
templates.open_body: Act II begins now. Please take your seats.

templates.label: Act II begins in N minutes
templates.body: Act II begins in {minutes} minutes. Please return to your seats.
templates.countdown_body: Act II begins in {minutes} minute{plural}. Please return to your seats.
templates.open_body: Act II begins now. Please take your seats.

templates.label: Performance has ended
templates.body: Thank you. The bar is open until {close_time}. Travel safe, see you soon.

templates.label: Medical emergency - silent
templates.body: If there is a doctor or first aider in the audience, please make yourself known to a member of staff.
templates._notes: Operator-only. Not visible to FoH UI.

templates.label: Lost something
templates.body: Lost property — please ask at the bar after the show.

templates.label: Tonight is SOLD OUT
templates.body: Tonight is sold out — ask at reception about returns.
templates._notes: When fired, obs-helper replaces the regular tickets-walkins slide (P13) with a SOLD-OUT overlay until cleared. Until cleared, that slot in the rotation skips the prices.

templates.label: Tonight: limited tickets
templates.body: Tonight's performance has a few tickets left. Ask at reception.
templates._notes: Soft scarcity message. Less urgent than tonight-sold-out.
